dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires context-dependent direction (long/short based on trend direction). Entry conditions use price crossing sma_50 with ADX confirmation. The requirement for '2 consecutive closes beyond MA' cannot be directly expressed with allowed operators and was simplified to a single crosses event, as consecutive bar logic is not supported. Exit uses MA crossover (opposite direction) OR ADX weakening as separate OR conditions. Stop loss set to 2% account risk as specified.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires context-dependent direction (long/short based on trend direction). Entry conditions use price crossing sma_50 with ADX confirmation. The requirement for '2 consecutive closes beyond MA' cannot be directly expressed with allowed operators and was simplified to a single crosses event, as consecutive bar logic is not supported. Exit uses MA crossover (opposite direction) OR ADX weakening as separate OR conditions. Stop loss set to 2% account risk as specified.

source_rule_text: Identify a trend criterion, enter in the direction of the trend, and exit when the trend ends or the signal fails.
